channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping in car park, 31st May
item.description:
Illegal fly tipping in Old Farm Ave car park Saw at 14:05pm on 31.05.2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 31st May
item.description:
Overflow everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fillebrook Avenue, Enfield

item.title: Overgrown street trees causing signal blockage, drainage flooding, and slip hazards., 31st May
item.description:
I am reporting the excessively large council street trees located on Globe Pond Road. The overgrown canopies are causing the a few local issues related to the infrastructure, drainage and safety. Please check when these trees were last on the cyclical pruning schedule and arrange an arboricultural assessment for a crown reduction and lift. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Globe Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in Colworth Grove, 31st May
item.description:
More rubbish on the footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colworth Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped waste next to public bin, 31st May
item.description:
This public bin consistently attracts fly tipping, particular over the weekend. At times there is also what appears to be commercial waste dumped next to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 49-53 Mansfield Road, 31st May
item.description:
Hello, I’d like to report several street trees outside 49–53 Mansfield Road, London, that need attention. Three trees along this stretch require re-securing, as the support ties have broken. In addition, the tree outside 49 Mansfield Road needs a replacement watering bag. The existing bag has split at the base and can no longer be filled with water. Photos attached if helpful.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-79, Mansfield Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped waste in front of hoardings, 31st May
item.description:
Fly tipped waste partially blocking pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 31st May
item.description:
Car received parking ticket weeks ago but has still not moved

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lincoln Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped suitcase, 31st May
item.description:
Flytipped suitcase full of rubbish, please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Agent signage and bollard on Agaton Path, 31st May
item.description:
These items were left in the middle of the path but someone has now moved these to one side of Agaton Path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Agaton Path, Longlands, Greater London

item.title: 49-51 Mansfield Road, NW3 2JE, 31st May
item.description:
Hello, I’d like to report several street trees outside 49–53 Mansfield Road, London, that need attention. Three trees along this stretch require re-securing, as the support ties have broken. In addition, the tree outside 49 Mansfield Road needs a replacement watering bag. The existing bag has split at the base and can no longer be filled with water. Photos attached if helpful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-79, Mansfield Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents flytip, 31st May
item.description:
Resident seen dumping items including pots of paint at the tree outside their back gate again. Paints can be very harmful for children and wildlife. Please remove arrange to have these removed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Weighton Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 gas canisters used for drug, 31st May
item.description:
The gas canisters were scattered on the road. We heard someone bringing them around 5.30am Sunday morning and selling them. I have taken them and put them on the pavement by Withen close so they can be collected as it was a hazard on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-24, Withens Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole 2m x 1m : 150mm deep, 31st May
item.description:
Large pothole, 2m x 1m, 150mm deep Previous tarmac repair carried out in 2024 now disintegrated and down to the sub base.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 31st May
item.description:
Various bags flytipped by recycling Bank. Food, plastic, possibly meat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
